mapper.select: SELECT HASHTAG.tag FROM POST_HASHTAG LEFT JOIN HASHTAG ON HASHTAG.HASHTAG_ID = POST_HASHTAG.HASHTAG_ID WHERE POST_HASHTAG.POST_ID = #{postId}

SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.POST_TYPE AS postType, p.TITLE AS title, p.MEMBER_ID AS authorId, p.NICKNAME AS nickname, p.VIEW_COUNT AS views, COALESCE(cc.cnt, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(lc.cnt, 0) AS likeCount, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM POST p
LEFT JOIN (SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_STATE = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY POST_ID) cc ON cc.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM POST_LIKE GROUP BY POST_ID) lc ON lc.POST_ID = p.POST_ID
INNER JOIN POST_HASHTAG ph ON ph.POST_ID = p.POST_ID INNER JOIN HASHTAG h ON h.HASHTAG_ID = ph.HASHTAG_ID AND h.TAG = #{keyword}
WHERE p.IS_DELETED = false
AND p.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST p WHERE p.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND p.IS_DELETED = false
